verifier_values.criteria: Reports 39 rolling features were created in the final dataset (exact threshold).
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: Confirm 39 rolling features were correctly created in the final dataset by counting each rolling sum/mean/rate column as one feature and excluding any intermediate rolling numerators/denominators.
